metadata.name: Boss Rush
metadata.description: Boss Rush Mode featuring safe rooms after every three bosses and low to medium powered equipment. Intended as an 'Arcade Mode' featuring many easter eggs.
author: MottZilla
eldri7ch

comment: Build off the Adventure preset for relic location data

placeRelic.comment: Spirit Orb at Cube of Zoe
Soul of Wolf at Jewel Sword
Form of Mist at Power of Wolf
Faerie Card at Jewel of Open (Shop)
Sword Card at Soul of Bat
Crissaegrim (Fire of Bat) at Holy Symbol

replaceRelic.comment: Replace all non-entrance Relics with Meal ticket

prologueRewards.comment: If the player does 41-0 heart prologue, they get a free vial stack nuke.

itemLocations.comment: Place a obsidian sword at the Heart vessel above Death
Place a Ice Brand jst out of reach at the Life vessel above Death
Place a Ring of Pales at the Life vessel above Entrance
Place an Onyx across fomr the Cube of Zoe Location
Place a Garnet in one of the vases near Succubus in Caverns
Place a Garnet in one of the vases near reverse Succubus room in Reverce Caverns
Place a Damascus Sword in one of the vases near reverse Succubus room in Reverce Caverns
Place a Turquoise in one of the vases in Left Attic

enemyDrops.comment: Force Bone Scimitar to drop useable potions
